privileged_info_summary: The task involves a Balanced Scorecard (BSC) framework with 16 strategic objectives for hospital digital transformation distributed across 4 perspectives: Financial (3 objectives), Customer (4), Internal Processes (5), and Learning & Growth (4). The task requires creating 17 cause-and-effect arrows connecting these objectives. The diagram path is /home/ga/Diagrams/hospital_strategy_map.drawio and the PDF export path is /home/ga/Diagrams/hospital_strategy_map.pdf. The four perspectives use validated hex color codes: #FFD700 (Gold) for Financial, #4DA6FF (Cornflower Blue) for Customer, #66CC66 (Fern/Light Green) for Internal Processes, and #FF9966 (Atomic Tangerine/Orange) for Learning & Growth. All objectives, arrows, colors, and paths have been verified against the setup script and web sources.
